summary: The NAT resolver divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in an unknown-variant parse error path; no NAT parsing behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 155: M	crates/net/nat/src/lib.rs.
The isolated patch only adds a semicolon to the UnknownVariant return for unrecognized NAT resolver strings.
No extip prefix handling, IP parsing, NAT resolver variant selection, or error content changed.
